name: Five Nights at Freddy's: Help Wanted 2

reviews.review_description: as a OG FNAF fan I love the sequel to the first VR game and I hope they add like a holiday DLC like for Christmas because I have the Halloween DLC for the first game too and it would be cool to see the animatronic in festive clothing and the graphics are amazing 10 out of 10 game👍🏻👍🏻😁😁.

I've played this game already for more than a year, and it is great. There were a few issues at first like when I first opened the game, it wouldn't play the opening sequence, but all I had to do is reset my VR. A few things I wish were different: The loading times are so.etimes ridiculous, but i mean, its understandable, there's only so much stuff a VR can load quickly. Another thing, I do have to wait a while to take off the mask because it has to load the second pizzeria, but after I do it once, I dont have to do it again until after I play a mini game. 
Altogether it is amazing and I cant wait for Fnaf Help Wanted 3(Lmao)
ALSO MOST OF THE 1 STAR REVIEWS ARE ABOUT THE GAME BEING EITHER TOO SCARY(LOL) OR TOO HARD(SKILL ISSUES DUDES) GUYS JUST GET THE GAME, GIT GUD MORONS!
And come on people, if it doesn't open, try again, or reset your VR.
There is only so many objects a stand alone Vr can load quickly stop being a bunch of *redacted*

the game was really fun i didn't finish it but the one where it's kinda hard because well for example you would have to do all the stuff but then she jumps scary out of nowhere. so that's a glitch i also love this the moon care so one that one's a masterpiece

I am a hardcore fnaf fan and have every game I could on my switch and I recently got an oculus and finally got the games I couldn’t play before and that includes fnaf help wanted 2 and I love it best game in the series and I hope they add dlc
Some minigames are great, some are just so annoying that you wish you could just get someone else to do it. Especially love food prep 3 and funtime freddy+yendo and I hope yall don't get stuck

I like it a lot it doesn’t really get old, but I would like more parts and service because that would be really fun and you’re doing maintenance on the glam rock that would be very good if they do a DLC for that I would definitely buy it

This game is really good if your wanting a horror game that isn't as scary but really love fnaf I would recommend this game as the jumpscares are not as bad as the first game. There is so many things you can do in this game

I have been a Fnaf fan since the fist game came out to sotm, and the reason I rated it 4 stars instead of 5 is because I always get stuck on the ballora gallery even tho I used to have sl on my pc and completed ballora, but the be version is hard for some reason.
Thank you steel wool!

I’m not gonna waste time and just say the game is fun and awesome I’m not gonna go into detail becuz I don’t feel good rn but ye there r bugs and sometimes loading times suck but its fun so definitely download this game 👍

I've had this game since August, it worked perfectly up untill a month ago the app wont open, it keeps crashing and I have uninstalled and reinstalled several times and it just keeps saying "help wanted 2 has stopped" can't even get to the title screen. Waste of money, can't find any where to report this
It is a good game but in pizzax3 it wont let me make pizzaritto like the machine wont work and i cant complete it. The game is overall so good i love it

This game takes no internet and has all sorts of stuff too do in it and even two secret endings if any review says this is bad their tripping just if you play this and your volumes all the way up be warned too have trauma on the art sun and moon daykare mini game
I hate this  game
Most scary games don’t bother me, this one actually does, it has a amazing atmosphere, good jumpscares, and good graphics
I think the remake of fnaf 1-3 in fazerblast was the best part. Load time is so fast
I played this game and ofc did great with the horror but I saw tons of bugs especially characters not unloading but otherwise the game is great

Hey! Me and my freinds want there to be a multiplayer version can you do that? And btw the idea for multiplayer is that you start in single player but there is a phone or something to join a different server
The game is fun and high quality but to be honest I'm too scared to play it and that's the only reason it's not a 5 star rating

This is a really really good game if your into fnaf games there is soo much to do and there is so much lore it’s the best game I own worth every cent but after beating it, it can be a little boring so in conclusion really fun and good game but devs MAKE HELP WANTED 3!!!!!
Pls?

As a five nights at Freddy’s OG and played all of Scott’s games this is one of the best experience I had with the first help-wanted. It really got me set up on everything. I love five nights at Freddy’s. I would always play with my sister and my brothers special with security breach mixed in with it, this is one heck of a game five stars all the way.

I was kind of excited to get this game for a while now and once I finally got it, it just wasn’t what I was really expecting. The graphics are in the middle and there are only like 15 levels that are actually fun. But I guess if you just play the fun ones it’s good but, I honestly am disappointed. Needs to be more like the last one.
it's a very good game in my opinion 🐇🐻🐥
I like it but some of the games are unfun
All of these little kids hating on this game for not being scary enough for their standards, id like to see them make a game like this.

I just got the last ending I needed today and let me say, "Wow these are cool endings." The fact that there are 3 endings is great and also the minigames are fun but sometimes hard but oh well that's what makes this game a challenge! I would just like to say thank you for your development in this game and work as hard as this in the future please.
Its a non scary amazing fnaf game
5gehd

This game is really awesome and I really like it but there is one small issue that pretty much guarantees your death, it happened to me in the scrap baby first aid mission in the staff only section. Idk if this happens with piggy patch and lefty but it played an ad on the tv right as the screen turned black to give me a new patient, right as I regained consciousness I died. Besides that this game is really fun and I enjoy replaying all the missions just because they are so much fun.
I recommend this game to anyone that loves fnaf the only downside is that it gets hard but its still super fun and awesome, but when your done with the game your done with the game.
It had exciting minigames with challenges and some endings and give us a lot of lore that is an amazing game

reviews.review_title: A little fast and the tutorial is harsh
reviews.review_description: When I select a game and play it, it instantly gets into it fast as heck barely any tutorial and even during the tutorial for some games I can still die pretty easily and the options section for graphics is literally JUST brightness and most the setting are extremely limited but I did enjoy stabbing helpy in the neck with a pen and hammering his leg and the pen further in him and hitting him in the whackamole game
Sigma game
I love the mini games and the 3 endings Steel Wool Studios and Scott Cawthon you did a fantastic job we all love you
Foxy
Put the drinks and sides on the tray first than the food
Help wanted 2 is way better then help wanted 1, highly recommend

Older gamer completely new to the FNAF world. Played every horror vr game so far and this is the scariest one of them all . Don't make the same mistake I did, thinking this was a kid game lol you will be in for a rude awakening. Pure genius making simple tasks and errands an absolute master class in tension, dread, and straight up pants sh*tting  terror. The replay value is off the charts on some of these mini games, of which there are many of a wide variety. A great amount of content for the asking price. I could keep playing the concession stand and first aid segments forever. Also if you are on the fence which hw title to buy, this is supposed to be better than the first hw but I will buy that one next for the classic original fnaf games.

I've had my quest for about a week now and was enjoying this game at the start till I realized none of the games have any challenge or scare factor. I tried to refund this godawful game which for some reason only deleted the game. Once installed I had lost all my progress
best game yet on my meta quest
Absolute Cinema

So I pre-bought it but then my phone got lost and when it actually came out it said that I still had to buy it so they stole my money which I really should be getting back and I bought it again just me not even to like the game
It’s a great game lots of thrilling jumpscares and requires NO INTERNET
Im a massive fnaf fan and when i play it feels like im there
ever since I got this game, I’ve been scared but happy, and it’s awesome, if you like making food, surviving, and plot twists, this is the game for you!
I played the first game and it was also good  but I feel like this one is harder because of the Roxy makeup and more oh and by the way try not to get caught by big winny thick diddy 🧼😏👏🏿
I like this game a lot, but there is a bug that after I got all the prizes, it wasn’t letting me get the hoarder achievement
When you first join the cutsence is amazing the graphics pretty good the movement with the Anamatronics is peak

Buy it it is worth it. This game is so cool no problems at all tricky, fun, scary but can you make help wanted 3 secret of the mimic please  I would love it.

I wished the graphics for the meta quest was better and there was more things you can do it can you add a free dlc like Halloween or stuff like that. Overall it's a good game.

reviews.review_title: Everything I could want as a FNAF fan
reviews.review_description: This game feels so different yet still feels like something Scott would make. I feel like the closest thing was sister location and this ( no matter how terrifying that was) is 10 times scarier the replayibility is fantastic and you will be nawing on this for a while so it’s pretty cool
For whatever reason I can't make a pizzarito and now I can't complete the game 100% and it bothers me because im trying to get the secret ending

The game was scary, and some miniganes were good, but a lot of minigames have unclear instructions and are unnecessarily hard. The games are also very short, and I managed to beat the game in about 7 hours. They could've made more minigames or longer versions of the minigames.

So when I was 6 years old I saw my first fnaf video and from there on out I loved this franchise and since I got a vr headset all I could think about was getting this game so if you are a fan you should get this game
boring take forever to load i wish i could return it
got a quest 3s for smash and ts was the first game i got, its so fun and scary plus it kept me entertained for like 3-ish months and was even able to max it out
I love everything about this game but this game is just too scary not going to lie
To play
the minigames i heavily enjoy and the graphics though its heavily compressed at least it looks the same you cant even tell unlike security breach on switch anyways 10/10 game will play again
Dude ve been waiting to get this game forever.And as soon as I played it  I was scared for my life It was the best game I ever played I totally recommend for people to play
if you are looking for a game to scare your children, best pick. If you are a fan of fnaf Security Breach or sister location, you will like this.

reviews.review_title: I’m SO glad I got this game
reviews.review_description: I got this game not too long ago and I’m OBSESSED!! I know it came out a long time ago but this game is awesome still.

The game is excellent, but there are some immersion issues. Why can't we adjust the graphics settings? It's a real shame. And the fact that in the lobby we can only teleport and not walk normally is frustrating and ruins the immersion. Anyway, another GOAT of a game, FNAF, as usual.
Its really fun but not as scary as the first  help wanted

This game is so good, as a FNaF fan myself it is so cool. Im obsessed with security breach and i get to see glamrock freddy, sun, roxy, and glamrock chica upclose! if you are deciding on buying this i say you should. Anyways have a good day:D

reviews.review_title: One of the best vr game ever
reviews.review_description: This is perfect the graphics are goode the jumpscare are perfect it si a totaly diferent experience then the help wanted 1 its a litle bit scary but not too much en its not required wifi
When I’m bored I play this game because I has a lot of action and awesomeness
Steal wool thank u for making this possible I cant thank u less thank u for the other games u have made too.
Kids will write down stuff like multiplayer and game not opening well as a Fr game that does not have stupid gorilla tag movement it’s awesome
I like it but Roxy keep killing me in the ruin Roxy makeup but it took me 1 year to complete it but sill recommend
This is so good but it is a little hard so if your not good at puzzles and things like that this isn't for you
we are FNAF
This game makes me go threw my childhood from 2014 tell 2024 this franchise has come along way and this is my favourite game
Because they don't give u more time like in dj an endo so that's why

I got this game recently and it's awesome! The minigames are sometimes challenging yet fun! The game also introduces some great lore and is overall a fun game to play!
